requestedAction: Create one branch, update approved Social Media Management System v1.1 starter files, and open one pull request in gurnoorbassi/ag-social-media-management-system.
scope: This approval allows AG OS to use GitHub for exactly one live v1.1 builder milestone in the existing private repository gurnoorbassi/ag-social-media-management-system. The allowed live actions are limited to creating branch ag-os/social-media-system-v1-1-upgrade from main SHA d3fcd8c6435433169686c2ec404a5f00c6cc62bd, updating README.md, package.json, index.html, src/main.js, src/styles.css, src/data/templates.js, src/lib/safety.js, and src/lib/status.js, and opening exactly one pull request to main. This approval does not allow repository creation, merging, deployments, Netlify, n8n activation, domain or DNS changes, paid actions, credentials, social account connections, posting, scheduling, DMs, comments, analytics API usage, production data, customer data, real client private data, Lead Gen changes, AI Receptionist changes, Constitution changes, additional repositories, additional branches, or additional pull requests.
revocationPath: This approval is revoked, expired, cancelled, or invalidated when the owner says stop or revoke, the expiration passes, the target repository changes, the target branch changes, more than one pull request is needed, merge or deployment is requested, validation or boot check fails, GitHub reports a conflict, an incident opens for this scope, any prohibited action becomes necessary, or the action expands beyond creating one branch, updating the eight approved starter files, and opening one pull request.

evidence.reference: Current sprint granted scoped approval for the Social Media System v1.1 upgrade build: create branch ag-os/social-media-system-v1-1-upgrade, update approved starter app files, and open one PR to main.
npm.cmd run validate, npm.cmd run boot:check, and node --test tests/*.test.mjs passed before execution.

approvalText: Owner-approved orchestrated task: run Social Media System v1.1 + First Client Draft Readiness Sprint. Allowed live GitHub action for Phase 2: create branch ag-os/social-media-system-v1-1-upgrade, update starter app files, and open one PR to main in gurnoorbassi/ag-social-media-management-system. Do not merge until review passes.
